sections.section_1: Business. Demo Company designs and sells demonstration products for research purposes. The company operates one segment focused on education.
sections.section_1A: Risk Factors. We face risks from supply chain disruptions, geopolitical conflicts, and changes in trade policy including tariffs. Demand for our products depends on the broader macroeconomic environment.
sections.section_7: Management's Discussion and Analysis. Revenue grew modestly year-over-year. Margins were impacted by higher input costs and shipping disruptions in Asia. We continue to monitor inflation and the potential impact of new tariffs on imported components.
